OfmMarketing.voicesTitle: Built for creators who expect more
OfmMarketing.voicesSubtitle: What partners and creators look for in a premium onboarding experience.

0.quote: I wanted onboarding that felt as premium as my brand — not a generic form and a PDF in email.

1.quote: Having verification and contracts in one place saves our team hours every new creator we bring on.

2.quote: Clear steps, no confusion. I always knew what was next and what was left to finish.

0.a: Ambitious creators and OFM partners who want a professional onboarding experience — whether you're launching solo or with a management team.

1.a: You'll create an account, review required policies, complete identity verification, and sign onboarding documents — all guided inside the app.

2.a: Yes. We use a trusted verification partner (DIDIT) and do not store raw identity documents in our database.

3.a: Many creators finish in one session. Verification timing can vary; you can save progress and return anytime.

4.q: I already have an account — where do I sign in?
4.a: Use Creator login to continue where you left off in onboarding or access your profile.

OfmMarketing.closingBody: Join creators who launch with Visual Era. Apply today — we'll guide you through every step.
OfmMarketing.closingNote: No commitment until you complete your application.

CrmLanding.metaTitle: Visual Era | CRM for Creators & Agencies
CrmLanding.metaDescription: The premium creator and agency CRM — messaging, analytics, smart lists, and AI copilot in one calm workspace.

hero.title: Run your creator empire from one premium workspace
hero.description: Visual Era brings messaging, revenue analytics, team shifts, and AI assistance together — built for ambitious creators and the agencies that scale them.

why.title: Why teams choose Visual Era
why.subtitle: Enterprise-grade reliability with a creator-first experience — so you can focus on growth, not glue code.

0.title: Bank-grade security
0.body: Encryption in transit and at rest, role-based access, and audit-friendly controls for agency teams.

1.title: Built for performance
1.body: Fast inbox loads, smart caching, and workflows tuned for high-volume creator operations.

2.title: Safety by design
2.body: Policies, permissions, and guardrails that protect creators, fans, and your brand reputation.

3.title: 99.9% uptime
3.body: Reliable infrastructure so your team never misses a high-value conversation or launch window.

4.title: Expert onboarding
4.body: Dedicated specialists help agencies migrate lists, automations, and reporting without downtime.

5.title: 24/7 support
5.body: Real humans when you need them — across time zones, launches, and campaign crunches.

revenue.title: Turn conversations into revenue
revenue.subtitle: Tools that help chatters sell smarter — without burning out your team.

0.title: Message fans faster
0.body: Unified inbox with templates, tags, and shortcuts built for creator sales workflows.

1.title: Smart messages
1.body: Send the right offer at the right time with rules based on spend, recency, and intent.

2.title: Priority mass
2.body: Queue high-value fans first while still reaching everyone on your list safely.

3.title: Smart lists
3.body: Dynamic segments that update as fans subscribe, tip, churn, or re-engage.

analytics.title: Make more by knowing what drives growth
analytics.subtitle: See revenue, messaging, and team performance in one place — no spreadsheet archaeology.

0.title: Message dashboard
0.body: Track reply rates, PPV performance, and chatter efficiency in real time.

1.title: Fan reports
1.body: Understand LTV, churn risk, and top spenders with exportable insights.

2.title: Employee reports
2.body: Fair, transparent metrics for chatters and team leads — aligned with your KPIs.

3.title: Shift scheduling
3.body: Plan coverage, handoffs, and accountability across time zones and campaigns.

copilot.title: AI Copilot for creator teams
copilot.subtitle: Draft replies, summarize threads, and surface opportunities — always on your terms.

0.title: Reply suggestions
0.body: Context-aware drafts that match your tone and compliance rules.

1.title: Thread summaries
1.body: Catch up on long fan histories in seconds before you take over.

2.title: Revenue insights
2.body: Spot upsell moments and at-risk fans without digging through tabs.

3.title: Team playbooks
3.body: Turn your best performers' patterns into shared guidance for new chatters.

testimonials.title: Loved by creators and agencies
testimonials.subtitle: Illustrative voices from teams who run professional creator operations.

0.quote: We replaced three tools with Visual Era. Our chatters finally have one inbox and leadership finally has one source of truth.
0.name: Morgan R.

1.quote: Smart lists alone paid for the switch — we reach VIPs first and our mass campaigns feel intentional, not spammy.

2.quote: The analytics dashboard is what I always wished for: revenue, shifts, and messaging in a single Monday-morning view.

community.title: What teams are prioritizing
community.subtitle: Original poll-style snapshots from the Visual Era community — not third-party data.

0.question: What would help your team most this quarter?

1.question: How do you track creator growth today?

0.a: Professional creators and agencies who need a unified CRM for messaging, revenue analytics, team operations, and AI-assisted workflows.

1.a: Yes. Start a free trial with no credit card required. Explore core inbox and reporting features before you commit.

2.q: Can I migrate from another tool?
2.a: Our onboarding team helps agencies import lists, tags, and historical notes. Timing depends on roster size and data format.

3.a: Copilot suggests drafts and summaries using your thread context. You approve every message before it sends — nothing goes out automatically.

4.q: Do you support multiple creators per workspace?
4.a: Yes. Agencies can manage multiple creator accounts with role-based access, shifts, and per-creator reporting.

5.a: We use secure cloud infrastructure with encryption in transit and at rest. Contact sales for regional or compliance-specific questions.

finalCta.title: Ready to grow with clarity?
finalCta.body: Join creators and agencies who run their business on Visual Era. Start your free trial today.
finalCta.note: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

form.verifyEmailHint: Enter the code we sent to your email.

notices.proxyBlockedTitle: Sign-in cannot load on this host
notices.proxyBlockedLocalLead: Local dev needs Clerk development keys (pk_test_ / sk_test_). Your .env.local uses production pk_live_, which only works on
notices.proxyBlockedLocalHint: Add development keys to NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY_DEV / CLERK_SECRET_KEY_DEV in .env.local (keep production keys in *_PROD). Omit NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PROXY_URL for pk_test_, then restart npm run dev. See docs/ops/LOCAL_ENV.md.
notices.proxyBlockedProd: The Clerk Frontend API proxy for this origin returned host_invalid. Production keys require a registered proxy at /__clerk — see docs/ops/CLERK_PROXY_SETUP.md or run npm run smoke:clerk-proxy.
notices.unavailableBody: Refresh the page. If the problem continues, try again in a few minutes.
